deals.title: 3504 Painted Riv
deals.notes: Off-market flip. Purchase $199K, rehab $65K, ARV $340K, projected profit $42-62K. Close May 1. CMA: 31 comps, avg $207K, estimated value $266K.
deals.next: Chris to pull MLS comps and RPR report, feed to Sirhc, build analysis sheet

logs.m: Analysis requested. Property details confirmed. CMA data compiled.

deals.title: 00 Borregas
deals.notes: Land/acreage listing terminated. Chris walking away, signs picked up. Sisters ended listing after March. Isaac Linares development interest (~$150K offer for mobile home project) did not move forward. Title defect confirmed and being addressed by attorney Van Hutchins.
deals.next: None - listing canceled, no path forward

logs.m: Listing canceled - walking away from deal. Signs picked up from property last week.
Price adjustment conversation needed. Isaac development angle expanded. Josh LT flagged as potential partner.
Jennifer Ball confirmed title defect via Deed #20100079485. Attorney Van Hutchins preparing Correction Deed. ENV Title reviewing.
Chris updated sisters on showing. Discussed Isaac Linares development offer (~$150K). Sisters enthusiastic about development angle.

deals.title: 340 Sollock Dr
deals.notes: Listing terminated by mutual agreement. Matt and Chandler moving back into property to make updates and repairs, then relist later. Originally underwater by $93-143K before selling costs. Short sale path was most likely solution. Chandler was laid off - hardship documentation on file.
deals.next: Confirm signed termination release received from Matt and Chandler

logs.m: Listing terminated by mutual agreement - owners moving back in to make updates, plan to relist.
Call completed - Chris presented all three paths. Chandler laid off. Short sale appeared most viable.
Market analysis sent showing underwater position and three options: short sale, assumption, or bring cash.
Ran Express Offers - returned $550K (likely overvalued). CMA shows $350-400K. Lawn service follow-up ongoing.

deals.title: 10023 Mill Path
deals.notes: Listed May 14. Referral from Isaac Linares. Sellers relocating to NC - high urgency (leave second week June). List price $259,900. Second-look buyers are hottest lead - came back, home is their favorite. Pre-inspection report offered. Hairline foundation crack noted - disclosed appropriately.
deals.next: Confirm tomorrow showing time (May 30). Follow up with second-look buyers agent. Monitor for backup offer.

logs.m: Second-look buyers came back for second showing - their favorite property. Pre-inspection report offered. Today 2pm showing rescheduled to May 30.
Texted Jose and Katy about investor cash offer at $176,300. Fourth showing scheduled May 23 at 1:30pm.
MLS live, sign and lockbox dropped. Canvassed neighborhood - distributed flyers. First showing 9:15am feedback received.
Listing agreement signed. Photos in from ATG. Going live May 13.
Listing consultation on-site with Isaac. CMA recommended $259,900. Sellers confirmed list price via email.

deals.title: 485 W FM 462
deals.notes: Prior clients going through divorce - need to sell. Property details: 3 bed/2 bath, 1,809 sqft, 4.05 acres, built unknown. Payoff ~$257K (Feb 17 balance). Recommended list price $295K for realistic net proceeds. Thin market - only 3 comps in 10 miles.
deals.next: Get updated payoff letter from lender. Confirm acreage and renovation status. Get listing agreement signed. Schedule professional photos.

logs.m: Met at property. Payoff confirmed $255,578 as Feb 17. CMA pulled - thin market. Built listing presentation with net sheet.
Prior clients helped with original VA renovation loan. Divorce situation - need to finish renovation and sell. Colton looking for contractor work.

deals.title: Tilden 20 acres
deals.notes: Under contract with Espinoza buyers at $113,000. 20 acres hunting property with feeders, blinds, buildings. Buyer agent is Javier. Escrow opened with Chicago Title (Alyssa Castillo). TXR 1903 amendment sent to Javier. EMD not yet received. Backup offer interest received.
deals.next: Confirm EMD received and signed TXR 1903 amendment back from Javier. Verify Mrs. Espinoza email domain.

logs.m: New buyers Espinoza family. TXR 1903 amendment sent to Javier. EMD not yet received. Another agent interested in backup offer.
Steve signed amendment - TXR 1404 uploaded. MLS updated to $117,500. Exclusions locked in.
Steve sent new photos - clearing complete. Prospect interested in showing/subdividing.
Clearing complete - Steve finished job and sent photos. Posted to social media. Drone footage as next priority.

deals.title: 8449 Coughran Rd
deals.notes: Cash transaction - $152,000. Closed and funded April 26-27, 2026. Lien blocker resolved via Fernando Castillo signature. Military buyer through Sam VanDenheuvel, Exquisite SA. Chicago Title handled closing.
deals.next: Confirm commission received. Deliver Joy gift basket + rug + trolley. Thank Sam and Michael (notary).

logs.m: Transaction officially confirmed closed and funded.
Cleared, funded and closed.
Lien release picked up from notary Michael - Fernando signed. Release delivered to Chicago Title. Joy signed at UPS Store.
Spoke with Fabian Cerrillo (family member) - willing to work with us on lien resolution.

deals.title: 181 CR 7751
deals.notes: Priority Bank FSB foreclosure. REO - cleanup ongoing via HouzzPro/Matt Toney. Drywall crew patching holes. Utilities pending: Medina Electric (need transformer #) and EMCSUD water. Police reports stalled. Listing agreement still needs to go to Jerry Sadler and Ray Stidham.
deals.next: Call Medina Electric (866-632-3532) and EMCSUD (830-709-3879). Replace camera batteries. Get police reports. Submit listing agreement to bank. Establish listing timeline once work complete.

logs.m: Police reports still pending. Utility companies not yet responded. Camera needs new batteries. Listing agreement still open item.
Drywall crew actively patching. Sent photos to Kelly. Need to update Kelly, Jerry, and Ray on progress.
Floor demo complete, drywall cut. Utility providers confirmed. Transformer number to grab on-site - submit Medina Electric application for new meter.
Work officially starting - dumpsters dropping this weekend.
Met with Matt Toney. Connected Matt directly with Jerry Sadler on phone call. Goal: work starts by Monday.

deals.title: Howell - 301 W Saxet Wholesale
deals.notes: Isaac brought wholesale deal at 301 W Saxet, Corpus Christi at $85K. Two structures - one livable, one 2BR teardown. FHA 203(k) financing angle - demo teardown, rehab main home. Zach S sent property info and CAD link. Mike and Isaac scheduled phone call today. LT (Josh) flagged as possible financing partner or alternate buyer.
deals.next: Follow up with Zach on 203(k) feasibility. Follow up after Isaac + Mike phone call. Loop in LT (Josh). If falls through, revisit new construction search.

logs.m: Isaac brought wholesale deal at $85K. Connected Mike and Alice with Isaac. Sent Zach property info for 203(k) evaluation.
Call completed with Mike and Chandler (different deal). New construction search on hold pending this deal.
Sent showingnew.com to Mike and Alice for new construction browsing.
Text from Mike - rental property being sold. Pivoting strategy to new construction. They were open to idea.

deals.title: 8527 Green Bliss Rental
deals.notes: Rental listing arrangement concluded. Listing agreement never executed. Jimbo backed out May 28. Chris sent $500 payment to cover time and costs invested. Ended on good terms - relationship intact.
deals.next: Confirm signed release received from Jimbo.

logs.m: Release sent to Jimbo with acknowledgment payment received. Closed out clean.
Jimbo backed out of rental listing arrangement. Chris sent $500 to cover costs. Skyslope listing to clear out.
Visited property - got photos. Floor not repaired. Possible foundation crack spotted near island. Sent notes to Brandon.

leads.title: Isaac Linares
leads.detail: Investor and referral partner. Brought multiple deals: Homestead Vested flip (3504 Painted Riv), Mill Path listing (Jose Arango), 301 W Saxet wholesale, Borregas land development interest. Development concept: mobile homes with veteran units. Partner Adam also active. Isaac looking at owner finance options.
leads.next: Continue deal flow collaboration. Follow up on 301 W Saxet progress with Mike Howell. Explore additional investor opportunities.

logs.m: Brought 301 W Saxet wholesale deal for Mike Howell evaluation at $85K.
Multiple active deals in pipeline - maintaining strong referral relationship.

leads.title: Sallie Mae F.
leads.detail: Community connection through garden share. Grief to healing to plants story. Potential content collaboration (needs permission). Real estate potential through trust-based, long-term relationship building.
leads.next: Follow up personally. Ask permission to share her story for content. Keep nurturing - no rush on real estate.

leads.title: Brandon Moran
leads.detail: Long-standing relationship - Chris helped him get into real estate. Two opportunities: (1) Uncle Jimbo rental setup at Green Bliss (ended), (2) Mom Milagros Stringer buyer for new construction. Milagros target: $50K down, ~$1,000/month payment. Builder rate buydowns are key angle. Not locked to any builder yet.
leads.next: Follow up on Milagros new construction timeline. Coordinate builder visits. Confirm pre-approval status.

logs.m: Jimbo (uncle) backed out of rental arrangement - payment received from Chris. Milagros new construction search continues independently.
MI Homes option from Frank found - keeps payments under $1,200/mo. Working multiple builder options.

leads.title: Milagros Stringer
leads.detail: Brandon Morans mother. New construction buyer - rental then owner-occupy strategy. Budget: $50K down, target $1,000/month P+I. Builder rate buydowns key to her buying power. Price range $224K-$324K depending on rate. Buyer rep agreement pending signature.
leads.next: Follow up on buyer rep signature. Coordinate new construction community tour with Brandon. Introduce to builder representatives.

logs.m: Buyer rep not yet signed - prioritize follow-up. MI Homes option from Frank under review.
Buyer rep sent to Milagros this morning - not yet signed.

leads.title: Christina Shine
leads.detail: Met at garden event May 9. Has property at 13810 Tangle Tree St planning to sell soon. Already working with realtor - not currently available. Property ~90% complete - having trouble finishing. Open to selling as-is. Pre-market buyer opportunity if Chris finds buyer through network.
leads.next: Follow up on finishing work progress. Offer to promote listing to Chris network. Stay connected through garden community.

logs.m: Met at garden event - community first approach, no pressure strategy established.

leads.title: Miss Pat Neighbor - Son
leads.detail: Miss Pat mentioned neighbor directly behind her may have passed away. Son now owns house. Previous owner was avid gardener. Probate/inherited property - son may not know what to do or may want to sell. Community connection through Miss Pat is warm intro bridge.
leads.next: Get more info from Miss Pat - son name and contact. Reach out as neighbor and gardener first. Assess if keeping, renting, or selling.

leads.title: Bryce + Wife
leads.detail: Met on-site at 181 CR 7751 (Priority Bank property) May 11. Bryce is dumpster contractor. Wife is active military - VA loan eligible. Recently moved from Ohio, currently renting. Looking to purchase in San Antonio area. Zero down, no PMI - strong buying power.
leads.next: Get Bryce contact info. Qualify wife VA eligibility. Connect with VA-approved lender. Send VA Buyers Guide.

logs.m: Met on-site at 181 CR - natural conversation, warm relationship established.

leads.title: Jerome Gardner
leads.detail: Jerome Gardner - downline agent in Schertz/Cibolo area. Has buyer interested in property that needs work - unique situation. Full details pending.
leads.next: Follow up with Jerome - get full buyer and property details. Understand financing and work scope. Identify matching inventory.

logs.m: Initial contact - details pending follow-up.

leads.title: Kurt Lehr
leads.detail: Neighbor around corner from 9815 Conbes. Watching nearby listing under contract at $275K. Interested in intel on offers received and deal details. Possible seller or buyer lead - needs follow-up to determine intent.
leads.next: Pull CMA for Kurts area. Follow up on listing agent at 9815 Conbes. Report back with market data. Determine if seller, buyer, or curious neighbor.

logs.m: Priority: pull CMA and get everything together to list this property.

leads.title: Josh LT
leads.detail: Potential partner for development projects. Flagged for Borregas mobile home development concept (Isaac/Adam). Also being considered as possible financing partner or alternate buyer on 301 W Saxet wholesale deal.
leads.next: Connect Josh with Isaac on development partnership. Discuss 301 W Saxet opportunity and financing terms.

priorities.notes: Second-look buyers came back May 29 - property is their favorite. Pre-inspection report offered. Rescheduled showing for May 30 - need to confirm time and follow up after showing with buyers agent for movement.

followUps.text: Confirm May 30 showing time with buyers agent and sellers
Follow up with buyers agent after showing - check for movement toward offer
If no movement after second showing, reach out directly to Jose and Katy with update

priorities.notes: Isaac brought deal. Mike and Alice evaluating with Zach S for FHA 203(k) financing. Mike and Isaac scheduled phone call May 29. Need to confirm deal is moving forward and get updates on Zach financing feasibility.

Follow up with Mike Howell after Isaac phone call - confirm deal is moving

priorities.title: Milagros Stringer - New Construction Buyer Registration
priorities.sub: Brandon Morans mother - builder visits and registration critical
priorities.notes: Milagros buyer rep sent but not yet signed. New construction search on hold. Must register Chris as buyer's agent on FIRST builder visit - this is critical. Budget $50K down, target $1,000/month. Rate buydowns key to shifting buying power. Multiple builders to present: Cadence Springs, Randall Crossing, Heartwood, Lago Mar.

followUps.text: Follow up on buyer rep agreement signature from Milagros - get signed ASAP
Coordinate with Brandon - confirm Wed or Thu visit timing with him and his mom
Call builder before visit - Carlos McLean (210-605-0241) - heads up about incoming buyer
CRITICAL: Register Chris as buyer's agent on first builder visit - must happen before they visit alone
Pull builder rate buydown and incentive options - emphasize to shift her buying power

priorities.title: Colton Brown - Listing Agreement and Photos
priorities.sub: 485 W FM 462, Moore TX - divorce sale, 3/2, 1,809 sqft, 4.05 acres
priorities.notes: Met May 15 at property. Payoff confirmed ~$257K. CMA completed - recommended list price $295K for realistic net proceeds. Net sheet built. Thin market - only 3 comps in 10 miles. Next: get updated payoff letter, confirm acreage and renovation status, get listing agreement signed, schedule professional photos.

followUps.text: Get updated payoff letter from lender before listing goes live
Confirm acreage is exactly 4.05 acres - impacts pricing significantly
Confirm renovation status - what is done, what is left to do
Get listing agreement signed with Colton and Abigail
Schedule professional photos - ready to launch listing
